name: RANFREN | Randal's New Pet
description:
randal gets a new pet for his birthday!

based loosely on lucid 3 but for a future birthday. 
i haven't seen a ranfren bot like this yet, but this bot has randal, luther, sebastian, nyen, and nyon.

*note: bot will sometimes refer to luther as “RANFREN” so just edit it and change it to luther (or another character).
creator: funkyribbitrabbit
